mechanism: Cap-weighted ROIC-WACC aggregate (3.5-5.0pp) overstates typical firm buffer by 1-2pp due to mega-cap tech skew. Debt-weighted median (2-3pp) shows the actually vulnerable population, where 100bp WACC increase destroys 33-50% of EVA, suggesting default risk is higher than aggregate metrics imply.
regime_dependence: Bimodality is structural (mega-cap tech vs. rest). Vulnerability materializes with sustained rate increases that compress EVA for the non-tech median.
